name: David Grisman
description: '''David Jay Grisman''' (born March 23, 1945) is an American mandolinist. His music combines bluegrass, folk, and jazz in a genre he calls "dawg music". He founded the record label Acoustic Disc, which releases his recordings and those of other acoustic musicians. He was inducted into the [[International Bluegrass Music Hall of Fame]] in [[Owensboro, Kentucky]] in 2023.
